description:
A commercial GEO satellite operator needs to relocate their SATCOM-7 communications satellite 30 degrees eastward from 105°W to 75°W. Using the specifications and constraints in ~/Desktop/relocation_directive.txt, design and propagate a two-impulse longitude drift maneuver in GMAT (retrograde burn, coast, and prograde recircularization). Save the mission script to ~/Documents/missions/geo_relocation.script and generate a report at ~/GMAT_output/relocation_results.txt. The report must contain the following key-value pairs: drift orbit semi-major axis (km), drift rate (deg/day), Burn 1 delta-V (m/s), Burn 2 delta-V (m/s), total delta-V (m/s), total drift duration (days), and final longitude estimate (deg West).
